title: Adebukola Ayeni and Odume Festus Discuss Digital PR Strategies at Nigeria Summit - FinancialEDGE

html:
The 10th edition of Nigeria Digital Public Relations Summit held in Lagos, had participants across key sectors of the economy.

The event’s theme, “Digital PR In Action: Owning Your Narratives, Telling Your Story,” brought together industry experts to discuss the evolving landscape of digital public relations.

Adebukola Ayeni, alongside Odume Festus, shared insights on effective digital PR strategies. The event focused on empowering organizations to take control of their narratives and storytelling in the digital age.

The summit provided a platform for professionals to exchange ideas and best practices in digital public relations.

 

Photo Caption: L-R: Team Lead Media and Communications Union Bank Adebukola Ayeni and Odume Festus, Editorial / Project Director Financial Edge, at the 10th edition of Nigeria Digital Publuc Relations Summit, 
in Lagos.
